    5718                 :            : 
    5719                 :            : /*
    5720                 :            :  * See if there is a recovery command file (recovery.conf), and if so
    5721                 :            :  * read in parameters for recovery in standby mode.
    5722                 :            :  *
    5723                 :            :  * XXX longer term intention is to expand this to
    5724                 :            :  * cater for additional parameters and controls
    5725                 :            :  * possibly use a flex lexer similar to the GUC one
    5726                 :            :  */
    5727                 :            : void
    5728                 :            : XLogReadRecoveryCommandFile(int emode)
    5729                 :            : {
    5730                 :            :         FILE       *fd;
    5731                 :            :         char            cmdline[MAXPGPATH];
    5732                 :      50683 :         bool            syntaxError = false;
    5733                 :            : 
    5734                 :      50683 :         fd = AllocateFile(RECOVERY_COMMAND_FILE, "r");
    5735         [ +  - ]:      50683 :         if (fd == NULL)
    5736                 :            :         {
    5737         [ +  - ]:      50683 :                 if (errno == ENOENT)
    5738                 :      50683 :                         return;                         /* not there, so no recovery in standby mode */
    5739         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(FATAL,
    5740                 :            :                                 (errcode_for_file_access(),
    5741                 :            :                                  errmsg("could not open recovery command file \"%s\": %m",
    5742                 :            :                                                 RECOVERY_COMMAND_FILE)));
    5743                 :          0 :         }
    5744                 :            : 
    5745         [ #  # ]:          0 :         ereport(emode,
    5746                 :            :                         (errmsg("Found recovery.conf file, checking appropriate parameters "
    5747                 :            :                                         " for recovery in standby mode")));
    5748                 :            : 
    5749                 :            :         /*
    5750                 :            :          * Parse the file...
    5751                 :            :          */
    5752         [ #  # ]:          0 :         while (fgets(cmdline, sizeof(cmdline), fd) != NULL)
    5753                 :            :         {
    5754                 :            :                 /* skip leading whitespace and check for # comment */
    5755                 :            :                 char       *ptr;
    5756                 :            :                 char       *tok1;
    5757                 :            :                 char       *tok2;
    5758                 :            : 
    5759         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 for (ptr = cmdline; *ptr; ptr++)
    5760                 :            :                 {
    5761         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (!isspace((unsigned char) *ptr))
    5762                 :          0 :                                 break;
    5763                 :          0 :                 }
    5764 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (*ptr == '\0' || *ptr == '#')
    5765                 :          0 :                         continue;
    5766                 :            : 
    5767                 :            :                 /* identify the quoted parameter value */
    5768                 :          0 :                 tok1 = strtok(ptr, "'");
    5769         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (!tok1)
    5770                 :            :                 {
    5771                 :          0 :                         syntaxError = true;
    5772                 :          0 :                         break;
    5773                 :            :                 }
    5774                 :          0 :                 tok2 = strtok(NULL, "'");
    5775         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (!tok2)
    5776                 :            :                 {
    5777                 :          0 :                         syntaxError = true;
    5778                 :          0 :                         break;
    5779                 :            :                 }
    5780                 :            :                 /* reparse to get just the parameter name */
    5781                 :          0 :                 tok1 = strtok(ptr, " \t=");
    5782         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (!tok1)
    5783                 :            :                 {
    5784                 :          0 :                         syntaxError = true;
    5785                 :          0 :                         break;
    5786                 :            :                 }
    5787                 :            : 
    5788         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (strcmp(tok1, "primary_conninfo") == 0)
    5789                 :            :                 {
    5790                 :          0 :                         PrimaryConnInfo = pstrdup(tok2);
    5791         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(emode,
    5792                 :            :                                         (errmsg("primary_conninfo = \"%s\"",
    5793                 :            :                                                         PrimaryConnInfo)));
    5794                 :          0 :                 }
    5795         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 else if (strcmp(tok1, "standby_mode") == 0)
    5796                 :            :                 {
    5797                 :            :                         /*
    5798                 :            :                          * does nothing if a recovery_target is not also set
    5799                 :            :                          */
    5800         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (strcmp(tok2, "on") == 0)
    5801                 :          0 :                                 StandbyModeRequested = true;
    5802                 :            :                         else
    5803                 :            :                         {
    5804                 :          0 :                                 StandbyModeRequested = false;
    5805                 :          0 :                                 tok2 = "false";
    5806                 :            :                         }
    5807         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(emode,
    5808                 :            :                                         (errmsg("StandbyModeRequested = %s", tok2)));
    5809                 :          0 :                 }
    5810         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 else if (strcmp(tok1, "log_restartpoints") == 0)
    5811                 :            :                 {
    5812                 :            :                         /*
    5813                 :            :                          * does nothing if a recovery_target is not also set
    5814                 :            :                          */
    5815         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (strcmp(tok2, "true") == 0)
    5816                 :          0 :                                 recoveryLogRestartpoints = true;
    5817                 :            :                         else
    5818                 :            :                         {
    5819                 :          0 :                                 recoveryLogRestartpoints = false;
    5820                 :          0 :                                 tok2 = "false";
    5821                 :            :                         }
    5822         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(LOG,
    5823                 :            :                                         (errmsg("log_restartpoints = %s", tok2)));
    5824                 :          0 :                 }
    5825                 :            :                 else
    5826         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(FATAL,
    5827                 :            :                                         (errmsg("unrecognized recovery parameter \"%s\"",
    5828                 :            :                                                         tok1)));
    5829                 :            :         }
    5830                 :            : 
    5831                 :          0 :         FreeFile(fd);
    5832                 :            : 
    5833         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (syntaxError)
    5834         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(FATAL,
    5835                 :            :                                 (errmsg("syntax error in recovery command file: %s",
    5836                 :            :                                                 cmdline),

    5838                 :            : 
    5839                 :            :         /*
    5840                 :            :          * Check for compulsory parameters

    5849                 :          0 :         }

    5859                 :            : /*
    5860                 :            :  * Exit archive-recovery state
    5861                 :            :  */
    5862                 :            : static void
    5863                 :            : exitArchiveRecovery(TimeLineID endTLI, uint32 endLogId, uint32 endLogSeg)
    5864                 :            : {
    5865                 :            :         char            recoveryPath[MAXPGPATH];
    5866                 :            :         char            xlogpath[MAXPGPATH];
    5867                 :          0 :         char            *xlogDir = NULL;
    5868                 :            : 
    5869                 :            :         /*
    5870                 :            :          * We should have the ending log segment currently open.  Verify, and then
    5871                 :            :          * close it (to avoid problems on Windows with trying to rename or delete
    5872                 :            :          * an open file).
    5873                 :            :          */
    5874 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         Assert(readFile >= 0);
    5875 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         Assert(readId == endLogId);
    5876 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         Assert(readSeg == endLogSeg);
    5877                 :            : 
    5878                 :          0 :         close(readFile);
    5879                 :          0 :         readFile = -1;
    5880                 :            : 
    5881                 :            :         /*
    5882                 :            :          * If the segment was fetched from archival storage, we want to replace
    5883                 :            :          * the existing xlog segment (if any) with the archival version.  This is
    5884                 :            :          * because whatever is in XLOGDIR is very possibly older than what we have
    5885                 :            :          * from the archives, since it could have come from restoring a PGDATA
    5886                 :            :          * backup.      In any case, the archival version certainly is more
    5887                 :            :          * descriptive of what our current database state is, because that is what
    5888                 :            :          * we replayed from.
    5889                 :            :          *
    5890                 :            :          * Note that if we are establishing a new timeline, ThisTimeLineID is
    5891                 :            :          * already set to the new value, and so we will create a new file instead
    5892                 :            :          * of overwriting any existing file.  (This is, in fact, always the case

    5910                 :            :                                         (errcode_for_file_access(),

    5960                 :            : 
    5961                 :            : /*
    5962                 :            :  * For point-in-time recovery, this function decides whether we want to
    5963                 :            :  * stop applying the XLOG at or after the current record.
    5964                 :            :  *
    5965                 :            :  * Returns TRUE if we are stopping, FALSE otherwise.  On TRUE return,
    5966                 :            :  * *includeThis is set TRUE if we should apply this record before stopping.
    5967                 :            :  *
    5968                 :            :  * We also track the timestamp of the latest applied COMMIT/ABORT record
    5969                 :            :  * in recoveryLastXTime, for logging purposes.
    5970                 :            :  * Also, some information is saved in recoveryStopXid et al for use in
    5971                 :            :  * annotating the new timeline's history file.
    5972                 :            :  */
    5973                 :            : static bool
    5974                 :            : recoveryStopsHere(XLogRecord *record, bool *includeThis)
    5975                 :            : {
    5976                 :            :         bool            stopsHere;
    5977                 :            :         uint8           record_info;
    5978                 :            :         TimestampTz recordXtime;
    5979                 :            : 
    5980                 :            :         /* We only consider stopping at COMMIT or ABORT records */

    5983                 :        439 :         record_info = record->xl_info & ~XLR_INFO_MASK;
    5984         [ +  + ]:        439 :         if (record_info == XLOG_XACT_COMMIT)

    5986                 :            :                 xl_xact_commit *recordXactCommitData;
    5987                 :            : 
    5988                 :          5 :                 recordXactCommitData = (xl_xact_commit *) XLogRecGetData(record);
    5989                 :          5 :                 recordXtime = recordXactCommitData->xact_time;
    5990                 :          5 :         }
    5991         [ +  + ]:        434 :         else if (record_info == XLOG_XACT_ABORT)
    5992                 :            :         {
    5993                 :            :                 xl_xact_abort *recordXactAbortData;
    5994                 :            : 
    5995                 :         19 :                 recordXactAbortData = (xl_xact_abort *) XLogRecGetData(record);
    5996                 :         19 :                 recordXtime = recordXactAbortData->xact_time;
    5997                 :         19 :         }
    5998                 :            :         else
    5999                 :        415 :                 return false;
    6000                 :            : 
    6001                 :            :         /* Do we have a PITR target at all? */
    6002         [ +  - ]:         24 :         if (!recoveryTarget)
    6003                 :            :         {
    6004                 :         24 :                 recoveryLastXTime = recordXtime;
    6005                 :         24 :                 return false;
    6006                 :            :         }
    6007                 :            : 
    6008         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (recoveryTargetExact)
    6009                 :            :         {
    6010                 :            :                 /*
    6011                 :            :                  * there can be only one transaction end record with this exact
    6012                 :            :                  * transactionid
    6013                 :            :                  *
    6014                 :            :                  * when testing for an xid, we MUST test for equality only, since
    6015                 :            :                  * transactions are numbered in the order they start, not the order
    6016                 :            :                  * they complete. A higher numbered xid will complete before you about
    6017                 :            :                  * 50% of the time...
    6018                 :            :                  */
    6019                 :          0 :                 stopsHere = (record->xl_xid == recoveryTargetXid);
    6020         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (stopsHere)
    6021                 :          0 :                         *includeThis = recoveryTargetInclusive;
    6022                 :          0 :         }
    6023                 :            :         else
    6024                 :            :         {
    6025                 :            :                 /*
    6026                 :            :                  * there can be many transactions that share the same commit time, so
    6027                 :            :                  * we stop after the last one, if we are inclusive, or stop at the
    6028                 :            :                  * first one if we are exclusive
    6029                 :            :                  */

    6037                 :            :

    6051                 :            :                         else

    6053                 :            :                                                 (errmsg("recovery stopping before commit of transaction %u, time %s",

    6062                 :            :                                                                 recoveryStopXid,
    6063                 :            :                                                                 timestamptz_to_str(recoveryStopTime))));
    6064                 :            :                         else

    6066                 :            :                                                 (errmsg("recovery stopping before abort of transaction %u, time %s",
    6067                 :            :                                                                 recoveryStopXid,

    6069                 :            :                 }

    6079                 :            : /*

    6096                 :            : static void
    6097                 :            : printEndOfXLogFile(XLogRecPtr   *loc)
    6098                 :            : {
    6099                 :          0 :         uint32 seg = loc->xrecoff / XLogSegSize;
    6100                 :            : 
    6101                 :            :         XLogRecPtr roundedDownLoc;

    6103                 :            :         XLogRecord *record;
    6104                 :            :         XLogRecPtr      LastRec;
    6105                 :            : 
    6106                 :            :         /*

    6109                 :            :          */

    6111                 :          0 :         roundedDownLoc.xrecoff = (seg * XLogSegSize) + SizeOfXLogLongPHD;

    6115                 :          0 :         record = XLogReadRecord(&roundedDownLoc, false, LOG);

    6117                 :            :         {
    6118                 :          0 :                 elog(LOG,"Couldn't read transaction log file (logid %d, seg %d)",
    6119                 :            :                          loc->xlogid, seg);
    6120                 :          0 :                 return;
    6121                 :            :         }
    6122                 :            : 
    6123                 :          0 :         do
    6124                 :            :         {
    6125                 :          0 :                 LastRec = ReadRecPtr;
    6126                 :            : 
    6127                 :          0 :                 record = XLogReadRecord(NULL, false, DEBUG5);
    6128         [ #  # ]:          0 :         } while (record != NULL);
    6129                 :            : 
    6130                 :          0 :         record = XLogReadRecord(&LastRec, false, ERROR);
    6131                 :            : 
    6132                 :          0 :         elog(LOG,"found end of transaction log file %s",
    6133                 :            :                  XLogLocationToString_Long(&EndRecPtr));
    6134                 :            : 
    6135                 :          0 :         XLogCloseReadRecord();
    6136                 :          0 : }

    6138                 :            : static void
    6139                 :            : StartupXLOG_InProduction(void)
    6140                 :            : {
    6141                 :            :         TransactionId oldestActiveXID;
    6142                 :            : 
    6143                 :            :         /* Pre-scan prepared transactions to find out the range of XIDs present */
    6144                 :         12 :         oldestActiveXID = PrescanPreparedTransactions();
    6145                 :            : 
    6146                 :         12 :         elog(LOG, "Oldest active transaction from prepared transactions %u", oldestActiveXID);
    6147                 :            : 
    6148                 :            :         /*
    6149                 :            :          * Initialize TransactionXmin to current oldestActiveXID, generally
    6150                 :            :          * initialized during GetSnapshotData(). This is to avoid situations where
    6151                 :            :          * scanning pg_authid or other tables mostly in BuildFlatFiles() below via
    6152                 :            :          * SnapshotNow may try to chase down pg_subtrans for older "sub-committed"
    6153                 :            :          * transaction, file corresponding to which may not and is not supposed to
    6154                 :            :          * exist. Setting this here will avoid calling SubTransGetParent() in
    6155                 :            :          * TransactionIdDidCommit() for older XIDs. Also, set RecentGlobalXmin
    6156                 :            :          * since Heap access method functions needs it to have good value as well.
    6157                 :            :          */
    6158                 :         12 :         TransactionXmin = RecentGlobalXmin = oldestActiveXID;
    6159                 :            : 
    6160                 :            :         /* Start up the commit log and related stuff, too */
    6161                 :         12 :         StartupCLOG();
    6162                 :         12 :         StartupSUBTRANS(oldestActiveXID);
    6163                 :         12 :         StartupMultiXact();
    6164                 :         12 :         DistributedLog_Startup(
    6165                 :         12 :                                                 oldestActiveXID,
    6166                 :         12 :                                                 ShmemVariableCache->nextXid);
    6167                 :            : 
    6168                 :            :         /* also initialize latestCompletedXid, to nextXid - 1 */
    6169                 :         12 :         ShmemVariableCache->latestCompletedXid = ShmemVariableCache->nextXid;
    6170         [ -  + ]:         12 :         TransactionIdRetreat(ShmemVariableCache->latestCompletedXid);
    6171                 :         12 :         elog(LOG, "latest completed transaction id is %u and next transaction id is %u",
    6172                 :            :                 ShmemVariableCache->latestCompletedXid,
    6173                 :            :                 ShmemVariableCache->nextXid);
    6174                 :            : 
    6175                 :            :         /* Reload shared-memory state for prepared transactions */
    6176                 :         12 :         RecoverPreparedTransactions();
    6177                 :            : 
    6178                 :            :         /*
    6179                 :            :          * Perform a checkpoint to update all our recovery activity to disk.
    6180                 :            :          *
    6181                 :            :          * Note that we write a shutdown checkpoint rather than an on-line
    6182                 :            :          * one. This is not particularly critical, but since we may be
    6183                 :            :          * assigning a new TLI, using a shutdown checkpoint allows us to have
    6184                 :            :          * the rule that TLI only changes in shutdown checkpoints, which
    6185                 :            :          * allows some extra error checking in xlog_redo.
    6186                 :            :          *
    6187                 :            :          * Note that - Creation of shutdown checkpoint changes the state in pg_control.
    6188                 :            :          * If that happens when we are standby who was recently promoted, the
    6189                 :            :          * state in pg_control indicating promotion phases (e.g. DB_IN_STANDBY_PROMOTION,
    6190                 :            :          * DB_INSTANDBY_NEW_TLI_SET) before the checkpoint creation will get
    6191                 :            :          * overwritten posing a problem for further flow. Hence, CreateCheckpoint()
    6192                 :            :          * has an ungly hack to avoid this situation and thus we avoid change of
    6193                 :            :          * pg_control state just in this special situation. CreateCheckpoint() also
    6194                 :            :          * has a comment referring this.
    6195                 :            :          */
    6196                 :         12 :         CreateCheckPoint(CHECKPOINT_IS_SHUTDOWN | CHECKPOINT_IMMEDIATE);
    6197                 :            : 
    6198                 :            :         /*
    6199                 :            :          * If this system was a standby which was promoted (or whose catalog is not
    6200                 :            :          * yet updated after promote), we delay going into actual production till Pass4.
    6201                 :            :          * Pass4 updates the catalog to comply with the standby promotion changes.
    6202                 :            :          */
    6203         [ -  + ]:         12 :         if (ControlFile->state == DB_IN_STANDBY_PROMOTED
    6204         [ +  - ]:         12 :                 || ControlFile->state == DB_IN_STANDBY_NEW_TLI_SET)
    6205                 :            :         {
    6206                 :          0 :                 ControlFile->state = DB_IN_STANDBY_NEW_TLI_SET;
    6207                 :          0 :                 ControlFile->time = time(NULL);
    6208                 :          0 :                 UpdateControlFile();
    6209         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(LOG, (errmsg("database system is almost ready")));
    6210                 :          0 :         }
    6211                 :            :         else
    6212                 :            :         {
    6213                 :         12 :                 ControlFile->state = DB_IN_PRODUCTION;
    6214                 :         12 :                 ControlFile->time = time(NULL);
    6215                 :         12 :                 UpdateControlFile();
    6216         [ +  - ]:         12 :                 ereport(LOG, (errmsg("database system is ready")));
    6217                 :            :         }
    6218                 :            : 
    6219                 :            :         {
    6220                 :            :                 char version[512];
    6221                 :            : 
    6222                 :         12 :                 strcpy(version, PG_VERSION_STR " compiled on " __DATE__ " " __TIME__);
    6223                 :            : 
    6224                 :            : #ifdef USE_ASSERT_CHECKING
    6225                 :         12 :                 strcat(version, " (with assert checking)");

    6341                 :            :

    6343                 :            : 
    6344                 :            : /*
    6345                 :            :  * Process passed checkpoint record either during normal recovery or
    6346                 :            :  * in standby mode.
    6347                 :            :  *
    6348                 :            :  * If in standby mode, master mirroring information stored by the checkpoint
    6349                 :            :  * record is processed as well.
    6350                 :            :  */
    6351                 :            : static void
    6352                 :            : XLogProcessCheckpointRecord(XLogRecord *rec, XLogRecPtr loc)
    6353                 :            : {
    6354                 :            :         CheckpointExtendedRecord ckptExtended;
    6355                 :            : 
    6356                 :         12 :         UnpackCheckPointRecord(rec, &ckptExtended);
    6357                 :            : 
    6358                 :            :         /*
    6359                 :            :          * In standby mode, empty all master mirroring related hash tables. Get
    6360                 :            :          * filespace, tablespace and database info from checkpoint record (master
    6361                 :            :          * mirroring part) and maintain them in hash tables.
    6362                 :            :          *
    6363                 :            :          * We'll perform this only during standby mode because during normal
    6364                 :            :          * non-standby recovery Persistent Tables do that job.
    6365                 :            :          */
    6366         [ -  + ]:         12 :         if (IsStandbyMode())
    6367                 :            :         {
    6368                 :          0 :                 mmxlog_empty_hashtables();
    6369         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (ckptExtended.masterMirroringCheckpointLen > 0)
    6370                 :          0 :                         mmxlog_read_checkpoint_data(ckptExtended.masterMirroringCheckpoint, &loc);
    6371                 :          0 :         }
    6372                 :            : 
    6373         [ +  - ]:         12 :         if (ckptExtended.dtxCheckpoint)
    6374                 :            :         {
    6375                 :            :                 /* Handle the DTX information. */
    6376                 :         12 :                 UtilityModeFindOrCreateDtmRedoFile();
    6377                 :         12 :                 redoDtxCheckPoint(ckptExtended.dtxCheckpoint);
    6378                 :         12 :                 UtilityModeCloseDtmRedoFile();
    6379                 :         12 :         }
    6380                 :         12 : }
    6381                 :            : 
    6382                 :            : 
    6383                 :            : /*
    6384                 :            :  * This must be called ONCE during postmaster or standalone-backend startup
    6385                 :            :  *
    6386                 :            :  *      How Recovery works ?
    6387                 :            :  *---------------------------------------------------------------
    6388                 :            :  *| Clean Shutdown case         |       Not Clean Shutdown  case|
    6389                 :            :  *|(InRecovery = false)         |       (InRecovery = true)     |
    6390                 :            :  *---------------------------------------------------------------
    6391                 :            :  *|                             |                  |            |
    6392                 :            :  *|                             |record after      |record after|
    6393                 :            :  *|                             |checkpoint =      |checkpoint =|
    6394                 :            :  *|                             |NULL              |NOT NULL    |
    6395                 :            :  *|                             |(bypass Redo      |(dont bypass|
    6396                 :            :  *|                             |                  |Redo        |
    6397                 :            :  *---------------------------------------------------------------
    6398                 :            :  *|                             |                  |            |
    6399                 :            :  *|     No Redo                 |No Redo           |Redo done   |
    6400                 :            :  *|     No Recovery Passes      |Recovery Pass done|Recovery    |
    6401                 :            :  *|                             |                  |Pass done   |
    6402                 :            :  *---------------------------------------------------------------
    6403                 :            :  */
    6404                 :            : void
    6405                 :            : StartupXLOG(void)
    6406                 :            : {
    6407                 :            :         XLogCtlInsert *Insert;

    6410                 :         12 :         bool            reachedStopPoint = false;
    6411                 :         12 :         bool            haveBackupLabel = false;

    6413                 :            :                                 LastRec,
    6414                 :            :                                 checkPointLoc,
    6415                 :            :                                 EndOfLog;

    6423                 :            :         /*

    6428                 :            :          */
    6429                 :         12 :         ReadControlFile();
    6430                 :            : 
    6431 [ +  - ][ -  + ]:         12 :         if (ControlFile->state < DB_SHUTDOWNED ||
    6432         [ +  - ]:         12 :                 ControlFile->state > DB_IN_PRODUCTION ||
    6433         [ +  - ]:         12 :                 !XRecOffIsValid(ControlFile->checkPoint.xrecoff))
    6434         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(FATAL,

    6436                 :            : 
    6437         [ +  + ]:         12 :         if (ControlFile->state == DB_SHUTDOWNED)
    6438         [ +  - ]:          2 :                 ereport(LOG,
    6439                 :            :                                 (errmsg("database system was shut down at %s",
    6440                 :            :                                                 str_time(ControlFile->time))));
    6441         [ -  + ]:         10 :         else if (ControlFile->state == DB_SHUTDOWNING)
    6442         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(LOG,
    6443                 :            :                                 (errmsg("database system shutdown was interrupted; last known up at %s",
    6444                 :            :                                                 str_time(ControlFile->time))));
    6445         [ -  + ]:         10 :         else if (ControlFile->state == DB_IN_CRASH_RECOVERY)
    6446         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(LOG,
    6447                 :            :                    (errmsg("database system was interrupted while in recovery at %s",
    6448                 :            :                                    str_time(ControlFile->time)),
    6449                 :            :                         errhint("This probably means that some data is corrupted and"
    6450                 :            :                                         " you will have to use the last backup for recovery."),
    6451                 :            :                         errSendAlert(true)));
    6452         [ -  + ]:         10 :         else if (ControlFile->state == DB_IN_STANDBY_MODE)
    6453         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(LOG,
    6454                 :            :                                 (errmsg("database system was interrupted while in standby mode at  %s",
    6455                 :            :                                                 str_time(ControlFile->checkPointCopy.time)),
    6456                 :            :                                                 errhint("This probably means something unexpected happened either"
    6457                 :            :                                                                 " during replay at standby or receipt of XLog from primary."),
    6458                 :            :                                  errSendAlert(true)));
    6459         [ -  + ]:         10 :         else if (ControlFile->state == DB_IN_STANDBY_PROMOTED)
    6460         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(LOG,
    6461                 :            :                                 (errmsg("database system was interrupted after standby was promoted at %s",
    6462                 :            :                                                 str_time(ControlFile->checkPointCopy.time)),
    6463                 :            :                                  errhint("If this has occurred more than once something unexpected is happening"
    6464                 :            :                                 " after standby has been promoted"),
    6465                 :            :                                  errSendAlert(true)));
    6466         [ -  + ]:         10 :         else if (ControlFile->state == DB_IN_STANDBY_NEW_TLI_SET)
    6467         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(LOG,
    6468                 :            :                                 (errmsg("database system was interrupted post new TLI was setup on standby promotion at %s",
    6469                 :            :                                                 str_time(ControlFile->checkPointCopy.time)),
    6470                 :            :                                                  errhint("If this has occurred more than once something unexpected is happening"
    6471                 :            :                                                 " after standby has been promoted and new TLI has been set"),
    6472                 :            :                                  errSendAlert(true)));
    6473         [ +  - ]:         10 :         else if (ControlFile->state == DB_IN_PRODUCTION)
    6474         [ +  - ]:         10 :                 ereport(LOG,
    6475                 :            :                                 (errmsg("database system was interrupted; last known up at %s",
    6476                 :            :                                                 str_time(ControlFile->time))));
    6477                 :            : 
    6478                 :            :         /* This is just to allow attaching to startup process with a debugger */

    6483                 :            :

    6486                 :            : 
    6487                 :            :         /*

    6496                 :            :

    6502                 :            :

    6513                 :            : 
    6514                 :            :                 /*

    6534         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(FATAL,

    6552         [ -  + ]:         12 :         if (StandbyModeRequested)

    6744                 :          0 :         }

    6746                 :          6 :                 InRecovery = true;
    6747                 :            :

    6749                 :            :         {

    6752                 :          0 :         }

    6754 [ +  + ][ -  + ]:         12 :         if (InRecovery && gp_before_persistence_work)

    6843                 :            :                 /*

    6848                 :            :                  * we're going to start replay from its redo pointer, which precedes
    6849                 :            :                  * the location of the checkpoint record itself. So even though the
    6850                 :            :                  * last record we've replayed is indeed ReadRecPtr, we haven't
    6851                 :            :                  * replayed all the preceding records yet. That's OK for the current

    6861                 :            :

    6875                 :            :                 }
    6876                 :            : 
    6877                 :            :                 /*

    6921                 :            :

    6929         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         if (!recoveryApply)
    6930                 :          0 :                                                 break;
    6931                 :          0 :                                 }
    6932                 :            : 
    6933                 :    6360680 :                                 errcontext.callback = StartupXLOG_RedoPass1Context;
    6934                 :    6360680 :                                 errcontext.arg = (void *) record;
    6935                 :    6360680 :                                 errcontext.previous = error_context_stack;
    6936                 :    6360680 :                                 error_context_stack = &errcontext;
    6937                 :            : 
    6938                 :            :                                 /*
    6939                 :            :                                  * Replay every XLog record read in continuous recovery (standby) mode
    6940                 :            :                                  * But while in normal crash recovery mode apply only Persistent
    6941                 :            :                                  * Tables' related XLog records

    6946                 :            :                                         /*
    6947                 :            :                                          * See if this record is a checkpoint, if yes then uncover it to
    6948                 :            :                                          * find distributed committed Xacts.
    6949                 :            :                                          * No need to unpack checkpoint in crash recovery mode
    6950                 :            :                                          */

    6952                 :            : 
    6953 [ -  + ][ #  # ]:       1010 :                                         if (IsStandbyMode() &&

    6955                 :          0 :                                                 (xlogRecInfo == XLOG_CHECKPOINT_SHUTDOWN

    6957                 :            :                                         {

    6962                 :          0 :                                         }
    6963                 :            :

    6966                 :            :                                         /*

    6970         [ -  + ]:       1010 :                                         SpinLockAcquire(&xlogctl->info_lck);

    6972                 :       1010 :                                         SpinLockRelease(&xlogctl->info_lck);
    6973                 :       1010 :                                 }
    6974                 :            : 
    6975                 :            :                                 /* Pop the error context stack */

    6977                 :            : 
    6978                 :    6360680 :                                 LastRec = ReadRecPtr;
    6979                 :            : 
    6980                 :    6360680 :                                 record = XLogReadRecord(NULL, false, LOG);
    6981                 :            : 
    6982                 :            :                                 /*
    6983                 :            :                                  *  If the last (actually it is last-to-last in case there is any
    6984                 :            :                                  *  record after the latest checkpoint record during the reading

    6986                 :            :                                  *  for Pass 1 should be decided

                 [ #  # ]
    6994                 :          0 :                                                 XLogCtl->pass1StartLoc = checkPoint.redo;
    6995                 :            :                                         else

    6998                 :          0 :                                 }

    7000 [ +  + ][ +  + ]:    6360680 :                         } while (record != NULL && recoveryContinue);
    7001                 :            : 
    7002                 :          9 :                         CurrentResourceOwner = NULL;
    7003                 :            : 
    7004         [ +  - ]:          9 :                         ereport(LOG,
    7005                 :            :                                         (errmsg("redo done at %X/%X",
    7006                 :            :                                                         ReadRecPtr.xlogid, ReadRecPtr.xrecoff)));
    7007                 :            : 
    7008         [ +  + ]:          9 :                         if (recoveryLastXTime)
    7009         [ +  - ]:          8 :                                 ereport(LOG,
    7010                 :            :                                          (errmsg("last completed transaction was at log time %s",

    7017                 :         10 :         }
    7018                 :            : 
    7019                 :            :         /*
    7020                 :            :          * Kill WAL receiver, if it's still running, before we continue to write

    7022                 :            :          * subsequent records if it's still alive when we start writing WAL.
    7023                 :            :          */

    7025                 :            : 
    7026                 :            :         /*

    7029                 :            :          */

    7031                 :          0 :                 DisownLatch(&XLogCtl->recoveryWakeupLatch);
    7032                 :            : 
    7033                 :            :         /*
    7034                 :            :          * We are now done reading the xlog from stream.
    7035                 :            :          */
    7036         [ -  + ]:         12 :         if (StandbyMode)
    7037                 :            :         {
    7038 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                 Assert(ControlFile->state == DB_IN_STANDBY_MODE);
    7039                 :          0 :                 StandbyMode = false;
    7040                 :            : 
    7041                 :            :                 /* Transition to promoted mode */
    7042                 :          0 :                 ControlFile->state = DB_IN_STANDBY_PROMOTED;
    7043                 :          0 :                 ControlFile->time = time(NULL);
    7044                 :          0 :                 UpdateControlFile();
    7045                 :          0 :         }
    7046                 :            : 
    7047                 :            :         /*
    7048                 :            :          * Re-fetch the last valid or last applied record, so we can identify the
    7049                 :            :          * exact endpoint of what we consider the valid portion of WAL.

    7053                 :         12 :         XLByteToPrevSeg(EndOfLog, endLogId, endLogSeg);
    7054                 :            : 
    7055                 :         12 :         elog(LOG,"end of transaction log location is %s",
    7056                 :            :                  XLogLocationToString(&EndOfLog));
    7057                 :            : 
    7058                 :         12 :         XLogCtl->pass1LastLoc = ReadRecPtr;
    7059                 :            : 
    7060                 :            :         /*
    7061                 :            :          * Complain if we did not roll forward far enough to render the backup
    7062                 :            :          * dump consistent.
    7063                 :            :          */
    7064 [ +  + ][ -  + ]:         12 :         if (InRecovery &&
    7065 [ +  - ][ +  - ]:         10 :                 (XLByteLT(EndOfLog, ControlFile->minRecoveryPoint) ||
                 [ +  - ]
    7066                 :         10 :                  !XLogRecPtrIsInvalid(ControlFile->backupStartPoint)))
    7067                 :            :         {
    7068         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (reachedStopPoint)   /* stopped because of stop request */
    7069         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(FATAL,
    7070                 :            :                                         (errmsg("requested recovery stop point is before end time of backup dump")));

    7072         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(FATAL,
    7073                 :            :                                         (errmsg("WAL ends before end time of backup dump")));
    7074                 :          0 :         }
    7075                 :            : 
    7076                 :            :         /*
    7077                 :            :          * Consider whether we need to assign a new timeline ID.
    7078                 :            :          *
    7079                 :            :          * If we are doing an archive recovery, we always assign a new ID.      This
    7080                 :            :          * handles a couple of issues.  If we stopped short of the end of WAL
    7081                 :            :          * during recovery, then we are clearly generating a new timeline and must
    7082                 :            :          * assign it a unique new ID.  Even if we ran to the end, modifying the
    7083                 :            :          * current last segment is problematic because it may result in trying to
    7084                 :            :          * overwrite an already-archived copy of that segment, and we encourage
    7085                 :            :          * DBAs to make their archive_commands reject that.  We can dodge the
    7086                 :            :          * problem by making the new active segment have a new timeline ID.
    7087                 :            :          *
    7088                 :            :          * In a normal crash recovery, we can just extend the timeline we were in.
    7089                 :            :          *
    7090                 :            :          * GPDB: Greenplum doesn't support archive recovery.
    7091                 :            :          */
    7092                 :            :         if (false /*InArchiveRecovery */)
    7093                 :            :         {
    7094                 :            :                 /*
    7095                 :            :                  * Ran off end of WAL before reaching end-of-backup WAL record, or
    7096                 :            :                  * minRecoveryPoint. That's usually a bad sign, indicating that you
    7097                 :            :                  * tried to recover from an online backup but never called
    7098                 :            :                  * pg_stop_backup(), or you didn't archive all the WAL up to that
    7099                 :            :                  * point. However, this also happens in crash recovery, if the system
    7100                 :            :                  * crashes while an online backup is in progress. We must not treat
    7101                 :            :                  * that as an error, or the database will refuse to start up.
    7102                 :            :                  */

    7104                 :            :                 {
    7105                 :            :                         if (ControlFile->backupEndRequired)
    7106                 :            :                                 ereport(FATAL,
    7107                 :            :                                                 (errmsg("WAL ends before end of online backup"),
    7108                 :            :                                                  errhint("All WAL generated while online backup was taken must be available at recovery.")));
    7109                 :            :                         else if (!XLogRecPtrIsInvalid(ControlFile->backupStartPoint))
    7110                 :            :                                 ereport(FATAL,
    7111                 :            :                                                 (errmsg("WAL ends before end of online backup"),
    7112                 :            :                                                  errhint("Online backup should be complete, and all WAL up to that point must be available at recovery.")));
    7113                 :            :                         else
    7114                 :            :                                 ereport(FATAL,
    7115                 :            :                                           (errmsg("WAL ends before consistent recovery point")));
    7116                 :            :                 }
    7117                 :            :         }
    7118                 :            : 
    7119                 :            :         /* Save the selected TimeLineID in shared memory, too */
    7120                 :         12 :         XLogCtl->ThisTimeLineID = ThisTimeLineID;
    7121                 :            : 
    7122                 :            :         /*
    7123                 :            :          * Prepare to write WAL starting at EndOfLog position, and init xlog
    7124                 :            :          * buffer cache using the block containing the last record from the
    7125                 :            :          * previous incarnation.
    7126                 :            :          */
    7127                 :         12 :         openLogId = endLogId;
    7128                 :         12 :         openLogSeg = endLogSeg;
    7129                 :         12 :         XLogFileOpen(
    7130                 :            :                         &mirroredLogFileOpen,
    7131                 :         12 :                         openLogId,
    7132                 :         12 :                         openLogSeg);
    7133                 :         12 :         openLogOff = 0;
    7134                 :         12 :         Insert = &XLogCtl->Insert;
    7135                 :         12 :         Insert->PrevRecord = LastRec;
    7136                 :         12 :         XLogCtl->xlblocks[0].xlogid = openLogId;
    7137                 :         12 :         XLogCtl->xlblocks[0].xrecoff =
    7138                 :         12 :                 ((EndOfLog.xrecoff - 1) / XLOG_BLCKSZ + 1) * XLOG_BLCKSZ;
    7139                 :            : 
    7140                 :            :         /*
    7141                 :            :          * Tricky point here: readBuf contains the *last* block that the LastRec
    7142                 :            :          * record spans, not the one it starts in.      The last block is indeed the
    7143                 :            :          * one we want to use.
    7144                 :            :          */
    7145 [ +  - ][ -  + ]:         12 :         Assert(readOff == (XLogCtl->xlblocks[0].xrecoff - XLOG_BLCKSZ) % XLogSegSize);
    7146                 :         12 :         memcpy((char *) Insert->currpage, readBuf, XLOG_BLCKSZ);
    7147                 :         12 :         Insert->currpos = (char *) Insert->currpage +
    7148                 :         12 :                 (EndOfLog.xrecoff + XLOG_BLCKSZ - XLogCtl->xlblocks[0].xrecoff);
    7149                 :            : 
    7150                 :         12 :         LogwrtResult.Write = LogwrtResult.Flush = EndOfLog;
    7151                 :            : 
    7152                 :         12 :         XLogCtl->Write.LogwrtResult = LogwrtResult;
    7153                 :         12 :         Insert->LogwrtResult = LogwrtResult;
    7154                 :         12 :         XLogCtl->LogwrtResult = LogwrtResult;
    7155                 :            :

    7260                 :            :                  *   about to exit.  Rebuilding PT is the last operation

    7583                 :            :         /*
    7584                 :            :          * Pass 3 XLOG scan
    7585                 :            :          */
    7586                 :    6360671 :         while (true)
    7587                 :            :         {
    7588                 :            :                 ErrorContextCallback errcontext;
    7589                 :            : 
    7590                 :            :                 /* Setup error traceback support for ereport() */

    7593                 :    6360681 :                 errcontext.previous = error_context_stack;
    7594                 :    6360681 :                 error_context_stack = &errcontext;

    7598                 :            : 
    7599                 :            :                 /* Pop the error context stack */
    7600                 :    6360681 :                 error_context_stack = errcontext.previous;
    7601                 :            : 
    7602                 :            :                 /*
    7603                 :            :                  * For Pass 3, we read through the new log generated by Pass 2 in case
    7604                 :            :                  * there are Master Mirror XLOG records we need to take action on.
    7605                 :            :                  *

    7613                 :            :

    7617                 :            :          * Consider whether we need to assign a new timeline ID.
    7618                 :            :          *
    7619                 :            :          * If we were in standby mode, we always assign a new ID.
    7620                 :            :          * This currently helps for avoiding standby fail-back situation (If the original
    7621                 :            :          * primary is down and original standby is acting as the new primary, in such
    7622                 :            :          * a case original primary can't act as the new standby to avoid XLog mismatch)
    7623                 :            :          *
    7624                 :            :          * In a normal crash recovery, we can just extend the timeline we were in.
    7625                 :            :          */

    7627                 :            :         {
    7628                 :            :                 /* Read the last XLog record */
    7629                 :          0 :                 record = XLogReadRecord(&XLogCtl->pass1LastLoc, false, PANIC);
    7630                 :          0 :                 XLByteToPrevSeg(EndRecPtr, endLogId, endLogSeg);
    7631                 :            : 
    7632                 :          0 :                 ThisTimeLineID = findNewestTimeLine(recoveryTargetTLI) + 1;
    7633                 :          0 :                 writeTimeLineHistory(ThisTimeLineID, recoveryTargetTLI,
    7634                 :          0 :                                                         curFileTLI, endLogId, endLogSeg);
    7635         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(LOG,
    7636                 :            :                                 (errmsg("selected new timeline ID: %u", ThisTimeLineID)));
    7637                 :            : 
    7638                 :            :                 /* Save the selected TimeLineID in shared memory, too */
    7639                 :          0 :                 XLogCtl->ThisTimeLineID = ThisTimeLineID;
    7640                 :            : 
    7641                 :            :                 /*
    7642                 :            :                  * We are now done reading the old WAL. Make a writable copy of the last
    7643                 :            :                  * WAL segment.
    7644                 :            :                  */
    7645                 :          0 :                 exitArchiveRecovery(curFileTLI, endLogId, endLogSeg);
    7646                 :            : 
    7647                 :          0 :                 XLogCloseReadRecord();
    7648                 :          0 :         }
    7649                 :            :

    7652                 :            :          */

    7654                 :            :         {

    7690                 :            : 
    7691                 :            : /*
    7692                 :            :  * Startup Pass 4 can perform basic integrity checks as well as
    7693                 :            :  * PersistentTable-Catalog verification (if appropriate GUC is turned on).
    7694                 :            :  * If the GUC is NOT set --
    7695                 :            :  * 1. Only basic integrity checks will be performed.
    7696                 :            :  *
    7697                 :            :  * If the GUC is set --
    7698                 :            :  * 1. Both Non-DB specific and DB-specific verification checks
    7699                 :            :  * are executed to see if the system is consistent.
    7700                 :            :  * 2. First run of Pass 4 performs basic integrity checks and
    7701                 :            :  * non-DB specific checks. At the same time, next DB on which DB-specific
    7702                 :            :  * verifications are to be performed is selected.
    7703                 :            :  * 3. This DB selected in #2 will be used in the next cycle of Pass 4
    7704                 :            :  * as a new spawned process for verification purposes. At the same time,
    7705                 :            :  * a new database is selected for the subsequent cycle and thus this
    7706                 :            :  * continues until there are no more DBs left to be verified in the system.
    7707                 :            :  */
    7708                 :            : void
    7709                 :            : StartupXLOG_Pass4(void)
    7710                 :            : {
    7711                 :         12 :         bool doPTCatVerification = false;
    7712                 :            :         char *fullpath;
    7713                 :            : 
    7714                 :            :         /*
    7715                 :            :          * In order to access the catalog, we need a database, and a
    7716                 :            :          * tablespace; our access to the heap is going to be slightly
    7717                 :            :          * limited, so we'll just use some defaults.
    7718                 :            :          */
    7719         [ +  - ]:         12 :         if (!XLogStartup_DoNextPTCatVerificationIteration())
    7720                 :            :         {
    7721                 :         12 :                 MyDatabaseId = TemplateDbOid;
    7722                 :         12 :                 MyDatabaseTableSpace = DEFAULTTABLESPACE_OID;
    7723                 :         12 :         }
    7724                 :            :         else
    7725                 :            :         {
    7726                 :          0 :                 MyDatabaseId = XLogCtl->currentDatabaseToVerify;
    7727                 :          0 :                 MyDatabaseTableSpace = XLogCtl->tablespaceOfCurrentDatabaseToVerify;
    7728                 :            :         }
    7729                 :            : 
    7730                 :            :         /*
    7731                 :            :          * Now we can mark our PGPROC entry with the database ID
    7732                 :            :          * (We assume this is an atomic store so no lock is needed)
    7733                 :            :          */
    7734                 :         12 :         MyProc->databaseId = MyDatabaseId;
    7735                 :            : 
    7736                 :         12 :         fullpath = GetDatabasePath(MyDatabaseId, MyDatabaseTableSpace);
    7737                 :            : 
    7738                 :         12 :         SetDatabasePath(fullpath);
    7739                 :            : 
    7740                 :         12 :         RelationCacheInitializePhase3();
    7741                 :            : 
    7742                 :            :         /*
    7743                 :            :          * Start with the basic Pass 4 integrity checks. If requested (GUC & No In-Doubt
    7744                 :            :          * prepared Xacts) then pursue non-database specific integrity checks
    7745                 :            :          */
    7746         [ +  - ]:         12 :         if(!XLogStartup_DoNextPTCatVerificationIteration())
    7747                 :            :         {
    7748                 :         12 :                 PersistentFileSysObj_StartupIntegrityCheck();
    7749                 :            : 
    7750                 :            :                 /*
    7751                 :            :                  * Do the check for inconsistencies in global sequence number after the catalog cache is set up
    7752                 :            :                  * MPP-17207. Inconsistent global sequence number can be fixed with setting the guc
    7753                 :            :                  * gp_persistent_repair_global_sequence
    7754                 :            :                  */
    7755                 :            : 
    7756                 :         12 :                 PersistentFileSysObj_DoGlobalSequenceScan();
    7757         [ -  + ]:         12 :                 Insist(isFilespaceInfoConsistent());
    7758                 :            : 
    7759                 :            :                 /*
    7760                 :            :                  * Now we can update the catalog to tell the system is fully-promoted,

    7763                 :            :                  * primary state while the recovery is trying to stream.
    7764                 :            :                  */
    7765         [ -  + ]:         12 :                 if (ControlFile->state == DB_IN_STANDBY_NEW_TLI_SET)
    7766                 :            :                 {
    7767                 :          0 :                         GpRoleValue old_role = Gp_role;
    7768                 :            :         
    7769                 :            :                         /* I am privileged */
    7770                 :          0 :                         InitializeSessionUserIdStandalone();
    7771                 :            :                         /* Start transaction locally */
    7772                 :          0 :                         Gp_role = GP_ROLE_UTILITY;
    7773                 :          0 :                         StartTransactionCommand();
    7774                 :          0 :                         GetTransactionSnapshot();
    7775                 :          0 :                         DirectFunctionCall1(gp_activate_standby, (Datum) 0);
    7776                 :            :                         /* close the transaction we started above */
    7777                 :          0 :                         CommitTransactionCommand();
    7778                 :          0 :                         Gp_role = old_role;
    7779                 :            : 
    7780         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(LOG, (errmsg("Updated catalog to support standby promotion")));
    7781                 :            : 
    7782                 :          0 :                         ControlFile->state = DB_IN_PRODUCTION;
    7783                 :          0 :                         ControlFile->time = time(NULL);
    7784                 :          0 :                         UpdateControlFile();
    7785         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(LOG, (errmsg("database system is ready")));
    7786                 :          0 :                 }
    7787                 :            : 
    7788         [ +  - ]:         12 :                 ereport(LOG,
    7789                 :            :                         (errmsg("Finished BASIC startup integrity checking")));
    7790                 :            : 
    7791                 :            :                 /*
    7792                 :            :                  * Check if the system has any in-doubt prepared transactions
    7793                 :            :                  * If No(Yes) - Do(nt) perform extra verification checks
    7794                 :            :                  */
    7795         [ -  + ]:         12 :                 if (debug_persistent_ptcat_verification)
    7796                 :            :                 {
    7797                 :            :                         /*
    7798                 :            :                          * As the startup passes are Auxiliary processes and not pure Backeneds
    7799                 :            :                          * they don't have a user set. Hence, a concrete user id is needed.
    7800                 :            :                          * Pass 4 may perform some PersistentTable-Catalog verification, which
    7801                 :            :                          * uses SPI and hence will need a user id set
    7802                 :            :                          * Set the user id to bootstrap user id to obtain super user rights.
    7803                 :            :                          */
    7804         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (GpIdentity.segindex != MASTER_CONTENT_ID)
    7805                 :          0 :                                 Gp_role = GP_ROLE_UTILITY;
    7806                 :            : 
    7807                 :          0 :                         SetSessionUserId(BOOTSTRAP_SUPERUSERID, true);
    7808                 :          0 :                         StartTransactionCommand();
    7809                 :          0 :                         doPTCatVerification = !StartupXLOG_Pass4_CheckIfAnyInDoubtPreparedTransactions();
    7810                 :            : 
    7811                 :            :                         /* Perform non-database specific verification checks */
    7812         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (doPTCatVerification)
    7813                 :          0 :                                 StartupXLOG_Pass4_NonDBSpecificPTCatVerification();
    7814                 :            : 
    7815                 :          0 :                         CommitTransactionCommand();
    7816                 :          0 :                 }
    7817                 :         12 :         }
    7818                 :            : 
    7819                 :            :         /*
    7820                 :            :          * If a database (and thus its tablespace) has already been selected, perform

    7822                 :            :          *

    7825                 :            :          */

    7827                 :            :         {
    7828                 :            :                 /* Redundant usage to maintain code readability */
    7829         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (GpIdentity.segindex != MASTER_CONTENT_ID)
    7830                 :          0 :                         Gp_role = GP_ROLE_UTILITY;
    7831                 :            : 
    7832                 :          0 :                 SetSessionUserId(BOOTSTRAP_SUPERUSERID, true);
    7833                 :          0 :                 StartTransactionCommand();
    7834                 :            : 
    7835         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if(XLogStartup_DoNextPTCatVerificationIteration())

    7837                 :            :

    7840         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (!XLogCtl->pass4_PTCatVerificationPassed)
    7841                 :          0 :                                 elog(FATAL,"Startup Pass 4 PersistentTable-Catalog verification failed!!!");
    7842                 :          0 :                 }
    7843                 :            :                 else
    7844                 :            :                 {
    7845 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (Gp_role == GP_ROLE_DISPATCH && (GpIdentity.segindex == MASTER_CONTENT_ID))
    7846                 :            :                         {
    7847                 :          0 :                                 bool exists = false;
    7848                 :            :                                 postDTMRecv_dbTblSpc_Hash_Entry currentDbTblSpc;
    7849                 :            : 
    7850         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (!Persistent_PostDTMRecv_IsHashFull())

    7853                 :          0 :                                         currentDbTblSpc.tablespace = XLogCtl->tablespaceOfCurrentDatabaseToVerify;

    7859                 :          0 :                                         }
    7860                 :          0 :                                 }
    7861                 :          0 :                         }
    7862                 :            :                 }
    7863                 :            : 
    7864                 :          0 :                 CommitTransactionCommand();
    7865                 :          0 :         }

    7990                 :            : /*
    7991                 :            :  * Determine the recovery redo start location from the pg_control file.
    7992                 :            :  *
    7993                 :            :  *    1) Only uses information from the pg_control file.
    7994                 :            :  *    2) This simplified routine does not examine the offline recovery file or
    7995                 :            :  *       the online backup labels, etc.
    7996                 :            :  *    3) This routine is a heavily reduced version of StartXLOG.
    7997                 :            :  *    4) IMPORTANT NOTE: This routine sets global variables that establish
    7998                 :            :  *       the timeline context necessary to do ReadRecord.  The ThisTimeLineID
    7999                 :            :  *       and expectedTLIs globals are set.
    8000                 :            :  *
    8001                 :            :  */
    8002                 :            : void
    8003                 :            : XLogGetRecoveryStart(char *callerStr, char *reasonStr, XLogRecPtr *redoCheckPointLoc, CheckPoint *redoCheckPoint)
    8004                 :            : {
    8005                 :            :         CheckPoint      checkPoint;
    8006                 :            :         XLogRecPtr      checkPointLoc;

    8009                 :            :         XLogRecPtr checkPointLSN;
    8010                 :            : 
    8011 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         Assert(redoCheckPointLoc != NULL);
    8012 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         Assert(redoCheckPoint != NULL);
    8013                 :            : 
    8014         [ #  # ]:          0 :         ereport((Debug_print_qd_mirroring ? LOG : DEBUG1),
    8015                 :            :                         (errmsg("%s: determine restart location %s",
    8016                 :            :                          callerStr, reasonStr)));
    8017                 :            : 
    8018                 :          0 :         XLogCloseReadRecord();
    8019                 :            : 
    8020         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (Debug_print_qd_mirroring)
    8021                 :            :         {
    8022                 :          0 :                 XLogPrintLogNames();
    8023                 :          0 :         }
    8024                 :            : 
    8025                 :            :         /*
    8026                 :            :          * Read control file and verify XLOG status looks valid.
    8027                 :            :          *
    8028                 :            :          */
    8029                 :          0 :         ReadControlFile();
    8030                 :            : 
    8031 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         if (ControlFile->state < DB_SHUTDOWNED ||
    8032         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ControlFile->state > DB_IN_PRODUCTION ||
    8033         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 !XRecOffIsValid(ControlFile->checkPoint.xrecoff))
    8034         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(FATAL,
    8035                 :            :                                 (errmsg("%s: control file contains invalid data", callerStr)));
    8036                 :            : 
    8037                 :            :         /*
    8038                 :            :          * Get the last valid checkpoint record.  If the latest one according
    8039                 :            :          * to pg_control is broken, try the next-to-last one.
    8040                 :            :          */
    8041                 :          0 :         checkPointLoc = ControlFile->checkPoint;
    8042                 :          0 :         ThisTimeLineID = ControlFile->checkPointCopy.ThisTimeLineID;
    8043                 :            : 
    8044                 :            :         /*
    8045                 :            :          * Check for recovery control file, and if so set up state for offline
    8046                 :            :          * recovery
    8047                 :            :          */
    8048                 :          0 :         XLogReadRecoveryCommandFile(DEBUG5);
    8049                 :            : 
    8050                 :            :         /* Now we can determine the list of expected TLIs */
    8051                 :          0 :         expectedTLIs = XLogReadTimeLineHistory(ThisTimeLineID);
    8052                 :            :
